stemHtml: VFR flight, you suspect receiver failure (can't hear others but they can hear you). How do you proceed?

options.a: Say it twice on the first call, then transmit normally.
options.b: Preface each call with "Transmitting blind due to receiver failure" and state intentions, only on first call.
options.c: Say it twice on the first call only.
options.d: Preface each call with "Transmitting blind due to receiver failure" and state intentions, on every call.
